name: COMPLETE!!!! | (Female) Miles Tails Prower - She Wants To Move In With Her Hero (You)
description:
["What's wrong, Pal? Aren't I your best buddy?~ ❤️"]
"You ever have a chick straddling you, and you look up, and suddenly she's glowing from the inside out, kind of a bright orange?" "Yeah, I've had that. Who is this?" "It's me pal."

First thing I wanna say is, congratulations to The_Professionall_Idiot for reaching 200 followers! Second thing I wanna say is, I will update this bot later in the week like I first did with the Classic Amy bot. I'm uploading the "early access" version so you people can give me opinions, suggestions, and upload public chats and shit (also because I am practically a corpse rn and out of creativity so I decided to see if y'all like this or I should rework the intro message or whatever.)

Have a sex with her, be wholesome with her, I don't really care. In the story she's 19 years old.
It's 12:47 AM at the time of writing this rn and I'm dead tired so uhh I'll update this shit later when I have time and I've rested better. So uhh what I said about the update might've been an overstatement. My eyes hurt like shit and I can't work on bots until I get glasses and my appointment is all the way in fucking November. So, until then, sorry.

I realized I can add custom tags now so yippee. Still don't feel well enough to update (L on my part. I promise I'll update her one of these days when I feel like not shit).

10/12/2024 (DD/MM/YYYY): THE BOT IS FINALLY DONE!!! Sorry for taking so long and adding so little, but I've finally gathered enough motivation to finish her (the bot)!! Try asking her what's on her mind and call attention to the breaking of gender roles (I'm so tired rn can't even write cohesive sentences)https://youtu.be/55CyNweAIlg
